raw_title: Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement
title_en: Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement
title_zh: Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement
plain_summary_en: This paper studies Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Deliberation, Star (game theory), Movement (music), Political science. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Deliberation, Star (game theory), Movement (music), Political science. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Deliberation, Star (game theory), Movement (music), Political science, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around Deliberation, Star (game theory), Movement (music), Political science, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
